text: A person shall not be subject to both a notice of parking violation and a notice to appear for the same violation.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 1. Offenses [40000.1 - 40273]
#### Article 3. Procedure on Parking Violations [40200 - 40230]
##### § 40200.1

A person shall not be subject to both a notice of parking violation and a notice to appear for the same violation.

*(Added by Stats. 2009, Ch. 415, Sec. 5. (AB 144) Effective January 1, 2010.)*

subsections.text: A person shall not be subject to both a notice of parking violation and a notice to appear for the same violation.
